name: Conform

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

analyze the entire gui package, the scheduler, the parts lifecycle, and any other significant systems to ensure correct conformance to their resepective best patterns and practices. If any deviations from their best patterns and practices are found then correct them. Do not maintain any backwards compatibility constructs of any kind, and both update the readme for any changes and also remove any outdated information including newly unnecessary tests after this task is complete
